title: Add buyer full-text search
prompt: Add a query that searches buyers by name for the buyers list page. Return a BuyerSummaryDTO[]. Every query must remain org-scoped.
acceptanceCriteria: a searchBuyers query returns BuyerSummaryDTO[] ordered by relevance
the query is wired into the buyers list page DTO
every query filters by orgId (tenant scope preserved)

attempt.summary: Added searchBuyers with an ILIKE match and relevance ordering, wired it into the buyers list DTO, added a test for the happy path — but the search query's WHERE clause filters on the name term only and drops the orgId predicate.
